title.zh: 高性能 RISC-V SoC 设计与验证
title.en: High-Performance RISC-V SoC Design and Verification

journal.zh: 本科毕业设计 · 上海交通大学, 2026

description.zh: 基于 RISC-V C908 处理器完成 SoC 系统设计，构建 AXI/AHB/APB 三级总线架构，实现存储与多外设模块集成与地址映射。完成 AXI 到 UCIe 接口适配逻辑，实现地址映射与数据通路转换，编写 C 语言测试程序进行系统级验证。
description.en: Designed a complete SoC system based on the RISC-V C908 processor with AXI/AHB/APB three-level bus architecture, implementing memory and peripheral integration. Completed AXI-to-UCIe interface adaptation logic for address mapping and data path conversion, with C-level system verification.

title.zh: 基于 RISC-V 的 Transformer/CNN 硬件加速器设计
title.en: RISC-V Based Transformer/CNN Hardware Accelerator Design

journal.zh: 大学生创新项目 · 上海交通大学, 2025

description.zh: 搭建卷积神经网络硬件电路，完成架构设计、RTL 设计、验证平台搭建与逻辑仿真。基于 SMIC 0.18μm 工艺完成逻辑综合、时序分析与物理实现。实现 200K/s 输入特征图处理能力，时钟频率 96.7MHz，功耗 1.1W，面积 54.18mm²。
description.en: Implemented CNN hardware accelerator covering architecture design, RTL design, verification platform, and logic simulation. Synthesized on SMIC 0.18μm process achieving 200K/s input feature map processing at 96.7MHz clock frequency, 1.1W power consumption, and 54.18mm² area.

title.zh: 基于 EIC7700X 的 AI 边缘端教学辅助系统
title.en: AI Edge Computing Teaching Assistant System Based on EIC7700X

journal.zh: 全国大学生集成电路创新创业大赛 · 全国一等奖, 2025
journal.en: National IC Innovation Competition · First Prize, 2025

description.zh: 基于 EIC7700X 开发板和 AI 工具链进行 AI 边缘端应用开发，完成模型训练、量化、编译、部署全流程。通过 Yolo、ResNet34、Qwen2 等实现人脸检测、表情识别、语音/文本多模态交互等功能，实时监测学生情绪并进行个性化辅助教学。
description.en: Developed AI edge application on EIC7700X platform covering model training, quantization, compilation, and deployment. Implemented face detection, emotion recognition, and multimodal interaction using Yolo, ResNet34, and Qwen2 for real-time student engagement monitoring.
